dct_title_s: Map of the Gambia : With the coast & country adjoining, to accompany Dr. Madden’s report
dct_description_sm: The map was produced to accompany Dr Richard Robert Madden’s anti-slavery report published in: Great Britain. Parliament. House of Commons. Select Committee on the West Coast of Africa Report : together with the minutes of evidence, appendix, and index. 1842.
dct_rights_sm: Image courtesy University of Cape Town Libraries, Special Collections: Maps scanned under the William and Yvonne Jacobson Digital Africana Program at UCT. If you have questions, please contact David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
